text:

Descr:
We offer IT consulting, systems integration, corporate information systems based on bsd software. For more information, email: admin@linux.wroclaw.pl or visit our website: http://linux.wroclaw.pl We operate mostly  in Eastern Europe - Poland.

Thanks in advance.

Alan T.
